title: Practice Perfect: 42 Rules for Getting Better at Getting Better
author: Doug Lemov
targetAudience: Educators, Coaches, Trainers, Individuals seeking personal growth
relatedBooks: The Talent Code by Daniel Coyle
Mindset: The New Psychology of Success by Carol S. Dweck
Peak: Secrets from the New Science of Expertise by Anders Ericsson
keyInsights: Deliberate practice is essential for improvement.
Feedback is crucial for skill development.
Consistency in practice leads to mastery.
